title: Netanyahu announces halt of Israel strikes after Trump pressure — warns won't hesitate to resume if Iran launches more missiles; mutual halt but no formal ceasefire
snippet: Netanyahu announced a halt to Israeli strikes on Iran following pressure from Trump. Netanyahu warned he 'won't hesitate to resume' if Iran launches more missiles. Combined with Iran's halt announcement, this creates a mutual halt of hostilities — but without a formal ceasefire agreement. Both sides retain the option to resume at any time. Covered by CNN liveblog, CNBC.
tag_reason: Netanyahu's halt announcement is the Israeli counterpart to Iran's halt — together they form a mutual halt (new event); the conditional nature and Trump's role are distinct from previous ceasefire dynamics
